message:
Running command: # Use --skip flag on the CLI instead.
# Also check what exact step ID string LibreLane uses for Checker.TrDRC
DESIGN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper"

nohup /home/user/.nix-profile/bin/librelane \
    "$DESIGN_DIR/config.json" \
    --flow Classic \
    --run-tag pnr_run_v4 \
    --from Checker.TrDRC \
    --skip OpenROAD.CheckAntennas \
    --skip Odb.CheckDesignAntennaProperties \
    > /tmp/pnr_v4_post_drt.log 2>&1 &

echo "LibreLane PID: $!"
echo $! > /tmp/pnr_v4_post_drt.pid

sleep 30
ps -p $(cat /tmp/pnr_v4_post_drt.pid) -o pid,stat,pcpu,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "ENDED EARLY"
tail -15 /tmp/pnr_v4_post_drt.log

args.command:

    > /tmp/pnr_v4_post_drt.log 2>&1 &
